command:
echo '=== FULL VM HEALTH CHECK VIA n8n_bridge SSH KEY ==='
KEY="/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge"

check_vm() {
  local label=$1
  local ip=$2
  local extra=${3:-""}
  echo "--- $label ($ip) ---"
  result=$(ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=5 -o BatchMode=yes     -i $KEY jose@$ip     "hostname; uname -r; df -h / | tail -1 | awk '{print \$3"/"\$2" "\$5}'; $extra" 2>&1)
  echo "$result"
}

check_vm "vm-backups (.192)" "192.168.0.192" "ls /mnt 2>/dev/null | head -3"
check_vm "vm-openclaw (.199)" "192.168.0.199" "systemctl is-active openclaw-gateway.service 2>/dev/null || echo 'no openclaw svc'; ls /home/jose/.config/openclaw/ 2>/dev/null | head -3"
check_vm "vm-dashboard (.201)" "192.168.0.201" "docker ps --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}' 2>/dev/null | head -8"
check_vm "vm-hermes (.202)" "192.168.0.202" "systemctl is-active hermes 2>/dev/null; ls /home/jose/ 2>/dev/null | head -5"
check_vm "vm-ecosystem (.203)" "192.168.0.203" "docker ps --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}' 2>/dev/null | head -8"
check_vm "vm-mcp-services (.204)" "192.168.0.204" "hostname; docker ps --format '{{.Names}}' 2>/dev/null | head -5"
check_vm "vm-memory (.205)" "192.168.0.205" "hostname; ls /home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate 2>/dev/null && echo delegator_present"

echo DONE_1896
